message:
fix(freeze): create closures with correct class for async/generator functions

The js_frozen_create_closure functions were hardcoding JS_CLASS_BYTECODE_FUNCTION
for all closures, but async functions need JS_CLASS_ASYNC_FUNCTION, generators
need JS_CLASS_GENERATOR_FUNCTION, etc. This caused async closures created by
frozen code to not return Promises correctly.

Added frozen_func_kind_to_class_id() helper that maps b->func_kind to the
correct class ID, matching QuickJS's func_kind_to_class_id table but without
requiring a forward declaration.

This fix enables tRPC to work correctly (20/20 tests now pass).
